lines.speaker: Dairy cow
lines.text: Moo, what do yoooou think you're doing?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Err... Nothing. Just checking that your cowbell was working. Don't want you to get lost!

lines.speaker: Dairy cow
lines.text: How exactly am I going to get lost when I'm tied down? What were yooo really doing?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I don't think you'll believe me.

lines.speaker: Dairy cow
lines.text: I'm a talking cow, I'll believe almost anything.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Fine. I need the bell to trick some penguins into helping me get into their secret lair.

lines.speaker: Dairy cow
lines.text: Well why didn't you say so? I've got a ton of these things. Go ahead and take the bell.

sections.title: Failing to steal the cow bell

lines.speaker: Dairy cow
lines.text: What are yooo interrupting me for? Can't you see I'm working here?
